summary_text: ### 修正対象 - [scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs) - [scripts/lib/guard.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js) ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs b/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs index 5de63d22..fe29926d 100644 --- a/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs +++ b/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs @@ -14,37 +14,31 @@ import process from "node:process"; import { spawn } from "node:child_process"; import failoverModule from "./lib/failover.js"; +import guardModule from "./lib/guard.js"; import timeoutTrackerModule from "./lib/timeout-tracker.js"; import outputFormatModule from "./lib/output-format.js"; import outputFilterModule from "./lib/output-filter.js"; const { getFailoverChain, isFailoverEligible } = failoverModule; +const { + loadGuardConfig, + validateDiversity, + validatePhaseEvidence, + summarizePhaseEvidenceStatus, + buildHealthSummary, + classifyProviderStatus, +} = guardModule; const { getAdaptiveTimeout, recordLatency } = timeoutTrackerModule; -const { generateRunId, safeJsonParse, stripAnsi } = outputFormatModule; +const { generateRunId, stripAnsi } = outputFormatModule; const { redactSecrets } = outputFilterModule; @@ -const GUARD_CONFIG_FILE = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "docs", "lane-guard.json"); const PROVIDER_STATE_FILE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "fugue-provider-state.json"); const LANE_RUNS_LOG = path.join(STATE_DIR, "lane-runs.jsonl"); const LANE_OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(CACHE_DIR, "lane-outputs"); -const PHASE_EVIDENCE_FILE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); -const SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS = { - lanes: { - min_active_lanes: 2, - min_distinct_providers: 2, - }, - phase_evidence: { - required_phases: ["plan", "simulate", "critique"], - block_on_missing: true, - }, - blocked_semantics: { - silent_degradation: false, - }, -}; @@ -function loadGuardConfig() { - const loaded = readJsonSafe(GUARD_CONFIG_FILE, null); - return { - ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS, - ...(loaded && typeof loaded === "object" ? loaded : {}), - lanes: { - ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS.lanes, - ...(loaded?.lanes && typeof loaded.lanes === "object" ? loaded.lanes : {}), - }, - phase_evidence: { - ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS.phase_evidence, - ...(loaded?.phase_evidence && typeof loaded.phase_evidence === "object" ? loaded.phase_evidence : {}), - }, - blocked_semantics: { - ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS.blocked_semantics, - ...(loaded?.blocked_semantics && typeof loaded.blocked_semantics === "object" ? loaded.blocked_semantics : {}), - }, - }; -} - const guardConfig = loadGuardConfig(); @@ -function classifyProviderStatus(providerState) { - if (!providerState) return "unknown"; - if (providerState.degraded) return "degraded"; - return providerState.lastOk ? "ok" : "error"; -} - function updateProviderState({ requestedProvider, provider, agent, ok, latencyMs, error, failedOverFrom }) { @@ -function validateDiversity(lanes, currentGuardConfig) { ... } -function validatePhaseEvidence(requiredPhases) { ... } -function summarizePhaseEvidenceStatus(currentGuardConfig) { ... } -function summarizeProviderHealth(state) { ... } -function buildHealthSummary(state, currentGuardConfig) { ... } - function validateMatrixDiversity(matrix) { ``` ```diff diff --git a/scripts/lib/guard.js b/scripts/lib/guard.js new file mode 100644 index 0000000..9e596ce --- /dev/null +++ b/scripts/lib/guard.js @@ -0,0 +1,178 @@ +const { existsSync, readFileSync } = require("node:fs"); +const os = require("node:os"); +const path = require("node:path"); + +const outputFormatModule = require("./output-format.js"); +const { safeJsonParse } = outputFormatModule; + +const HOME = os.homedir(); +const STATE_DIR = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "state"); +const GUARD_CONFIG_FILE = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "docs", "lane-guard.json"); +const PHASE_EVIDENCE_FILE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); +const SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS = { + lanes: { + min_active_lanes: 2, + min_distinct_...
